title: SgDP Semantic Feedback IR
description: Machine-readable intermediate representation of a specification-level conformance violation, produced by the SgDP framework's formal checker and consumed by the LLM repair stage. Three rendering variants (test_only, test_expected, semantic_ir) project this IR onto natural-language repair prompts.

violation_type.description: Semantic classification of the defect relative to the specification

scenario_index.description: 1-indexed FSF scenario that the witness activates

constraint_text.description: The guard predicate of the violated scenario as human-readable text

inputs.description: Concrete witness inputs that expose the fault

expected.description: Oracle output for the witness inputs (from SpecIR postcondition)

reason.description: Inferred natural-language root cause of the violation

priority.description: Severity rank (1 = highest priority for repair)

suggested_fix.description: Structural code change category hint for the repair stage
